div1.entryFree: Trail, subst. trace, track, scent: if I cry out thus upon no t. Wiv. IV, 2, 208 (if I bark, like a hound, on a wrong scent). or else this brain of mine hunts not the t. of policy so sure, Hml. II, 2, 47. how cheerfully on the false t. they cry, IV, 5, 109. this is an aspic's t., and these fig-leaves have slime upon them, Ant. V, 2, 354.
